title: Build Dashboard
use_when: Build an interactive HTML dashboard with charts, filters, and tables. Use when creating an executive KPI overview, turning query results into a shareable report, building a monitoring snapshot, or combining multiple charts and filters in one browser-openable file.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Build Dashboard when the request is mainly a different lifecycle artifact; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Build Dashboard UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks
framework_fit: Build Dashboard fits Analytics work in the Design lifecycle when the user needs Build Dashboard UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Build Dashboard UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks without tying recommendations to the user's Design stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Build Dashboard as generic Analytics advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Build Dashboard when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $build-dashboard to turn this build context into a decision-ready Build Dashboard UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks.
examples.expected_artifact: Build Dashboard UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks
